prompt: A realistic live-action-style portrait photo of a young Japanese woman in a retro sci-fi tokusatsu armored suit, framed from mid torso to just above the head, standing outdoors against a softly blurred concrete industrial background. She has black short wet hair in a messy bob tucked behind one ear, and her face is mostly hidden by a large rectangular blur censorship block centered over the face. She is holding 1 clear crinkled plastic water bottle in one hand, raised to her mouth as if drinking. The costume is a worn vintage hero suit with 4 visible main armor components: 2 glossy red shoulder pauldrons, 1 red-and-silver chest plate with scratches and grime, and 1 circular blue orb embedded on the right side of the chest. Under the armor is a shiny black bodysuit with a white high neck undersuit collar and a thin gold ring detail at the neck. Around the collar are 2 short ribbed metallic hoses connected to 2 small rectangular metal modules near the shoulders. The armor should look practical, scuffed, slightly dirty, and heavy, like an old Japanese special-effects superhero costume rather than sleek modern armor. Natural overcast daylight, shallow depth of field, muted gray concrete tones in the background, documentary cosplay photography, candid moment, highly detailed textures, realistic skin and fabric, vertical composition.
